summary: Code review approved GH-139 Loom v0.26.3 maintenance adoption on head fad454299a8560025a42727bd31fcff56dda695a. Review-readiness source-distribution tools are not applicable to this consumer repo because `tools/skills_surface.py check` and `tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only` are absent.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Authored review approved the current maintenance-only head; subsequent drift must remain limited to GH-139 Loom review/progress/status closeout carriers.
